node_7.subject: Maria Lopez
node_7.description: This is Maria Lopez's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 10:00 am, have brunch at Hobbs Cafe from 10:30 am to 11:30 am, study physics in the library from 11:30 am to 2:30 pm, take a break and watch gaming streams from 2:30 pm to 3:30 pm, Twitch stream gameplay from 3:30 pm to 6:30 pm, have dinner at 7:00 pm, relax and chat with friends on Twitch or Discord from 7:30 pm to 9:30 pm.
